items.claim: Damen Anderson has high-level grappling experience and a win over a high-level grappler in Gabrielle Vanderlay.
items.quote: The one thing I like about Damen Anderson is his loads of highlevel grappling experience on top of a Gabrielle Vanderlay win.

items.claim: Ezra Elliott has not yet fought high-caliber competition.
items.quote: Now that's because, you know, he's yet to fight anybody high caliber.

items.claim: Ezra Elliott has a significant size advantage over Damen Anderson.
items.quote: Size advantage for Ezra Elliott is probably the green flag of the night is being the naturally larger guy.

items.claim: Damen Anderson has a jiu-jitsu edge over Ezra Elliott.
items.quote: So you have to kind of favor the jiujitsu edge to Damen Anderson.

items.claim: Dioni Barbosa is a high-caliber grappler.
items.quote: veteran of the UFC, high caliber grappler

items.claim: Anna Milisano has a significant weakness in her ground game.
items.quote: the ground game is a huge red flag.

items.claim: Anna Milisano is a good striker.
items.quote: I like Milisano standup, but that's about it. She's a good striker

items.claim: RJ Harris has a 6'6 frame and an 80-inch reach.
Alvin Hines is coming off an anabolic steroid suspension.
items.quote: Alvin Hines on the other side is just incredibly average to me... coming off of an anabolic steroid suspension

items.claim: Alvin Hines lacks outstanding qualities as an MMA fighter.
items.quote: I don't see any outstanding qualities.
